welcome.title: Welcome to Sylk
welcome.description: Let's walk you through the basics so you can hit the ground running. This will only take a minute.

fab.title: Quick Actions
fab.description: This is your command center. Tap the + button anytime to access quick actions.

create-project.title: Create a Project
create-project.description: Tap "New Project" here, or go to the Chat tab and describe your job to the AI — it'll create the project with phases, tasks, and budget instantly. Chat is the fastest way to get started.

overhead.title: Track Your Overhead
overhead.description: This card shows your overhead costs at a glance. Tap it to add rent, insurance, truck payments, and other recurring expenses.

add-worker.title: Add Your Crew
add-worker.description: Tap + and select "Add Worker" to bring your team on board. They'll get their own app to clock in, submit daily reports, and view assignments.

extras.title: Reports & Expenses
extras.description: Use the + menu to log daily reports and track expenses on the go. Snap a receipt and the AI categorizes it for you.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.description: Head to the Chat tab anytime to ask the AI assistant for help — estimates, scheduling, financial reports, anything you need.

typicalContracts.headerSubtitle: Set up your common contract types
typicalContracts.infoText: Upload existing contract templates from files or photos. You can add more later in Settings.

twilioSetup.infoBannerText: Connect your Twilio account to enable client messaging via SMS and WhatsApp
twilioSetup.step1: Create a free account at twilio.com/try-twilio
twilioSetup.step3: Find Account SID and Auth Token in your Twilio Console
twilioSetup.step4: Enter credentials below and test the connection
twilioSetup.accountSidHelper: Found in Twilio Console → Account Info
twilioSetup.authTokenHelper: Click "Show" next to Auth Token in Twilio Console
twilioSetup.helpText:
• Make sure your Twilio account is active
• Verify you copied the Account SID and Auth Token correctly
• Test the connection before saving
• Cost: ~$2-3/month for phone number + messages

timeClock.noContractorAssigned: You haven't been assigned to a contractor yet. Ask your contractor to send you an invite, or wait for them to add you to their team.
timeClock.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about today's work...
